articles.title: Jonathan Trott joins Ireland as consultant amid England links
articles.description: Reportedly in the shortlist to take over as England's Test coach, Trott will work with Ireland for their upcoming series against Afghanistan

articles.title: Australia internationals unlikely to play much WNCL
articles.description: Australia's series against Bangladesh, New Zealand and the women's Champions Trophy, as well as the WPL likely to keep their best away from domestic cricket

articles.title: Axar, Gill deliver India's first win of UK tour
articles.description: Half-centurions Root and Dawson revived England after a collapse after Brook opted to bat

articles.title: High-flying Zimbabwe meet under-strength Bangladesh in T20I series opener
articles.description: Already without Litton, Mehidy, Taskin and Mahmud, Bangladesh will also miss the injured Mustafizur

articles.title: Tongue debut as England bat; Bumrah back for India
articles.description: The major change for England comes at the top of the order with Jacob Bethell opening for the first time

articles.title: Women's cricket shortchanged again as men's Test binfire sucks up the oxygen
articles.description: ECB complicit in fanning flames as momentous month for English game is repeatedly overshadowed

articles.title: Knight: 'Wanted to give my all this summer but right time to step away'
articles.description: Former England captain admits there were "tears" in dressing room, but is excited for what future holds

articles.title: Lennox stars with five wickets as New Zealand level ODI series
articles.description: West Indies lost all ten wickets for 75 on a tricky pitch before the visitors overcame some wobbles in the chase

articles.title: Hetmyer replaces injured Greaves for second and third NZ ODIs
articles.description: Hetmyer had earlier been left out of their squad for the first three ODIs to allow him to complete his MLC stint

articles.title: BBL returns to Christmas Eve, Australia Day final
articles.description: Christmas Day remains free of BBL action but the final will be played on January 26

articles.title: Australia Women's internationals likely to miss most of the 2026-27 domestic season
articles.description: The fixtures for the WNCL were released by Cricket Australia on Wednesday, July 15, but a sizeable number of internationals could miss the 50-over domestic competition.

articles.title: England vs India Prediction, 2nd ODI – Who will win today’s match between ENG vs IND?
articles.description: The match will be played at Sophia Gardens in Cardiff.

articles.title: 'This has come at the right time' - Saba Karim praises Axar Patel after match-winning all-round show in first ODI vs England
articles.description: Axar played a decisive role in India's win, first returning figures of 4/62 in 9.5 overs to help bowl England out for 258 before remaining unbeaten on 57 off 52 balls during the chase.

articles.title: 'I felt this was my last Test' - Sourav Ganguly's honest admission before iconic hundred
articles.description: Former India wicketkeeper reveals rare moment of India captain's crisis of confidence in 2002.

articles.title: 'He has no chance of playing in the 2027 World Cup' - Kris Srikkanth’s bold statement on Shivam Dube amid ENG vs IND ODI series
articles.description: Kris Srikkanth believes that Shivam Dube has no chance of playing the 2027 ODI World Cup but is only playing the series against England because Hardik Pandya and Nitish Kumar Reddy are injured.

articles.title: Shubman Gill closes in on Daryl Mitchell for No. 1 ODI batting ranking
articles.description: India captain scored a brilliant 80 runs before getting himself retired hurt.

articles.title: What is India's record at Cardiff in ODIs?
articles.description: India first played a game in the Welsh city back in 2011 and have not visited the iconic venue for 12 years.

articles.title: Smriti Mandhana declares herself 'ready' for India women's captaincy
articles.description: India's vice-captain outlines her philosophy on leadership and T20 World Cup lessons.

articles.title: Reports: Mumbai Indians to review captaincy, coaching, and trade plans ahead of IPL 2027
articles.description: The meeting is expected to involve the franchise's ownership and senior management, who will assess head coach Mahela Jayawardene's post-season report.

articles.title: 'I will open with KL Rahul' - Kris Srikkanth picks Shubman Gill’s potential replacement in 2nd ODI
articles.description: Former India opener Kris Srikkanth suggested how India could line up if Shubman Gill misses the second ODI against England on Thursday, July 16.
